project.name: CorvusDashboard
project.full_name: Corvus Dashboard — Local web UI for Resilient Tomorrow content pipeline
project.status: Phase 2b — Calendar + Kanban shipped; scheduling logic in place

decisions.decision: Vault markdown files are the single source of truth; no database
decisions.rationale: Corvus skills already write markdown to the vault. A DB would add sync complexity and a second source of truth. Every page load reads fresh file state.

decisions.decision: Calendar reuses the existing /schedule API rather than a new /reschedule endpoint
decisions.rationale: updateAdaptedSchedule already handles both initial scheduling and rescheduling (it just overwrites scheduled_date). No need to duplicate logic.

architecture_decisions.decision: SvelteKit with adapter-node and SSR disabled per-page where needed
architecture_decisions.rationale: Svelte 5 runes give clean reactive state; adapter-node lets us run as a plain Node process under LaunchAgent without Vercel/Cloudflare lock-in
architecture_decisions.details: pnpm package manager; Tailwind for styling; gray-matter for frontmatter; Vitest for unit tests; Playwright for E2E

architecture_decisions.rationale: Kanban + Calendar drag flows are simple enough (single drag source, per-column/per-day drop targets) that a library adds weight without value. Native events integrate cleanly with Svelte 5 runes.
architecture_decisions.details: dataTransfer carries {draftId, platform} as application/x-corvus-event MIME; drop handler calls the /schedule or /status API and invalidateAll()

phases.name: Approval Queue MVP
phases.description: Local web dashboard showing pending content drafts with per-platform approve/reject/edit, replacing Discord-based approvals
deliverables: Approval queue UI with status/platform filters

phases.name: Calendar + Kanban views
phases.description: Kanban board for pipeline visualization; Calendar (month + week) for scheduled content with drag-to-reschedule
deliverables: Kanban route with drag-between-columns and schedule modal
Calendar route with month and week views

phases.name: Analytics dashboard
phases.description: Charts and metrics for content pipeline throughput and performance

phases.name: Discord integration + preference learning
phases.description: Discord thread creation for discussion; capture approval/edit deltas into preference file

phases.name: Publishing
phases.description: Push approved+scheduled posts to each platform

changelog.author: Claude + Mike
changes: Built vault file I/O, grouping, frontmatter utilities with unit tests
Shipped approval queue UI with status/platform filters and inline edit
Added LaunchAgent for always-on service at localhost:4321
E2E tests for display, approval, and filtering

changelog.author: Claude + Mike
changes: Added /calendar route with month + week views
Built CalendarDayCell + CalendarEventChip components with HTML5 drag-and-drop
Drag-between-days reschedule wired to existing /api/adapted/:id/:platform/schedule endpoint
Click-to-reschedule modal with date input for precise moves
3 new Playwright E2E tests (render, click-reschedule, week view); all 6 suite tests green
Added scheduled fixture files (bluesky + threads) for draft-2026-04-15-002
